title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers · Contract Workshop
summary: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a failure-resilient inventory importer while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Match exception handlers to the hierarchy and catch the narrow failures the current boundary can recover from.
Use try, except, else, and finally so protected work, success work, and cleanup have distinct roles.
Raise meaningful exceptions and preserve or suppress causes deliberately with exception chaining syntax.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
